name: SNAP
description: The Supplemental Nutrition Assistance Program (SNAP) provides monthly funds for food.

name: WIC
description: The Special Supplemental Nutrition Program for Women, Infants, and Children (WIC) supports mothers and young children.

name: Medicaid
description: Medicaid provides free or low-cost health coverage to millions of Americans.

name: LIHEAP
description: The Low Income Home Energy Assistance Program (LIHEAP) helps families with energy costs.

name: Section 8 Housing
description: The Housing Choice Voucher Program (Section 8) helps families afford safe, decent housing.
